'''thadasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headfire|headfire]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headfire|headfire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thadasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædæsæth|thædæsæth]] || [[word:thædæsæj|thædæsæj]] || [[word:thædæsæsh|thædæsæsh]] || [[word:thædæsæ|thædæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadadasath|thadadasath]] || [[word:thadadasaj|thadadasaj]] || [[word:thadadasash|thadadasash]] || [[word:thadadasa|thadadasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadasath|thadasath]] || [[word:thadasaj|thadasaj]] || [[word:thadasash|thadasash]] || [[word:thadasa|thadasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadafsath|thadafsath]] || [[word:thadafsaj|thadafsaj]] || [[word:thadafsash|thadafsash]] || [[word:thadafsaf|thadafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadasatha|thadasatha]] || [[word:thadasaja|thadasaja]] || [[word:thadasasha|thadasasha]] || [[word:thadasaka|thadasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadasath|thadasath]] || [[word:thadasaj|thadasaj]] || [[word:thadasash|thadasash]] || [[word:thadasa|thadasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadasathal|thadasathal]] || [[word:thadasajal|thadasajal]] || [[word:thadasashal|thadasashal]] || [[word:thadasakal|thadasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadasathatha|thadasathatha]] || [[word:thadasajaja|thadasajaja]] || [[word:thadasashasha|thadasashasha]] || [[word:thadasaka|thadasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadasathan|thadasathan]] || [[word:thadasajan|thadasajan]] || [[word:thadasashan|thadasashan]] || [[word:thadasakan|thadasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadasathaoro|thadasathaoro]] || [[word:thadasajaoro|thadasajaoro]] || [[word:thadasashaoro|thadasashaoro]] || [[word:thadasakaoro|thadasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
